per_response.subject: Question about charge for order #NV23456
per_response.body: Hi, I recently received my order #NV23456 for the X500 Wireless Headphones, but when I looked at my bank statement, I noticed I was charged $129.99, which is $10 more than the price listed on your website. The order was placed on February 10th and I received an email confirmation with the total of $119.99. Could you please look into this and let me know what happened? My order details are as follows: 1 X500 Wireless Headphones, color: black, and the payment method was PayPal.
per_response.gold_reply: Dear valued customer, thank you for reaching out to us about the discrepancy in the charge for your order #NV23456. We apologize for the confusion. After investigating, we found that there was an error in our system that added a $10 shipping surcharge to your order, which was not reflected in your initial order confirmation. The correct total for your order, including the shipping surcharge, is indeed $129.99. However, since this was not clearly communicated to you, we would like to refund the $10 shipping surcharge back to your PayPal account as a one-time courtesy. You should receive the refund within the next 3-5 business days. If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact us.
per_response.generated_reply: Dear valued customer, thank you for reaching out to us about the charge for your order #NV23456. We apologize for the discrepancy and are happy to investigate this further. After reviewing your order, we found that the price of the X500 Wireless Headphones did indeed increase by $10 on February 12th, two days after your purchase. However, since you were charged the higher price, we will honor the original price of $119.99 as stated on our website at the time of your purchase on February 10th. We will process a refund of $10.00 to your PayPal account within the next 3-5 business days. If you have any further questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to contact us.

per_response.body: Dear Customer Support, I am writing to request a refund for my order #NV12345, which I placed on February 10th. I had ordered the 'X500 Smartwatch' for $249.99, but unfortunately, the device has stopped working properly after just two weeks of use. per_response.subject: Issue with Order #12345 - Defective SmartCam 9000
